duration: 5 minutes or so on first observation.
description: Darker-appearing sparrow with dark bill among White-crowned sparrows foraging/feeding on the ground under hanging feeder. Golden crown and very dark supercilium clearly visible. Hint of mustachial stripe. Unmarked breast. Back shows dark stripes similar to White-crowned sparrows. Size similar to White-crowned sparrows.Behaviors: Foraging/feeding under feeder.Call: Not heardPlumage: winter
